$comment: Machine-readable index of skills installable from this marketplace. Consumed by the Nekko Dojo website (https://nekkolabs.com/dojo/skills). Curated external skills are catalogued on the website itself (link-only), not here. Keep entries in sync with .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.

skills.name: Domain Finder
skills.description: Brainstorm startup/project names, check domain availability across TLDs via RDAP, and vet brand/trademark conflicts.
skills.author: Nekko Labs

skills.name: nyaa
skills.description: Convene a council of four reviewer cats (security, deps/supply-chain, correctness/concurrency, style) over a PR or working diff, pulling in external bot reviews too.
skills.author: Nekko Labs
